title: Task outcome: 마지막 DinoBrain closed-loop verifier patch를 확인하고, 검증 통과 시 app repo에 커밋 및 푸쉬한 뒤 작업을 완료한다. 승인 요청은 치명
summary: Closed the DinoBrain closed-loop verifier work. Verified the real managed Codex hook proof, made verify:goal use a durable live-proof window based on latest hook config/server build timestamps, made the MCP preflight proof advisory when live hook evidence exists, fixed the data Git hook verifier to honor Git safe.directory in sandboxed Windows ownership contexts, reran verify-data-git-hooks, npm run check, and verify:goal successfully, then committed and pushed app repo main at c377981.
claim: Task outcome for dinobrain: Closed the DinoBrain closed-loop verifier work. Verified the real managed Codex hook proof, made verify:goal use a durable live-proof window based on latest hook config/server build timestamps, made the MCP preflight proof advisory when live hook evidence exists, fixed the data Git hook verifier to honor Git safe.directory in sandboxed Windows ownership contexts, reran verify-data-git-hooks, npm run check, and verify:goal successfully, then committed and pushed app repo main at c377981.
request: 마지막 DinoBrain closed-loop verifier patch를 확인하고, 검증 통과 시 app repo에 커밋 및 푸쉬한 뒤 작업을 완료한다. 승인 요청은 치명적 작업이나 샌드박스/네트워크 요구 시에만 사용한다.
decisions: Use latest Codex hook config or server build mtime as verify:goal live proof lower bound so valid live hook evidence does not expire after the default recent window.
Treat codex_mcp_pre_response as advisory fallback evidence when codex_live_pre_response already proves the real managed hook path.
Do not change global Git config to bypass dubious ownership; pass safe.directory in the verifier Git calls instead.
next_steps: Continue keeping dinobrain-data operational and review-queue artifacts out of broad sync unless policy-approved or explicitly requested.

evidence.snippet: Closed the DinoBrain closed-loop verifier work. Verified the real managed Codex hook proof, made verify:goal use a durable live-proof window based on latest hook config/server build timestamps, made the MCP preflight proof advisory when live hook evidence exists, fixed the data Git hook verifier to honor Git safe.directory in sandboxed Windows ownership contexts, reran verify-data-git-hooks, npm run check, and verify:goal successfully, then committed and pushed app repo main at c377981.

review_notes: Held by review worklist action; candidate is low-signal or ephemeral and must not enter hot memory without manual confirmation.
